title: Agayam Theepidicha Lyrics Madras Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Song: Agayam Theepiditha
Singer(s): Pradeep Kumar
Movie: Madras (2014)
Music: Santhosh Narayanan
Lyrics: Kabilan
Lyrics in Thanglish
Exact translation of tamil words
Agayam Theepidicha
nilaa thoongumaa.
nee illaa neramellaam
nenjam thaangumaa.

solakaattu bommaikkoru
sondham yaarumilla
kaiyya vittu kadhal ponaa
kayyil regaiyilla.

Kannukulla ippa
kadal kasivadha paaru
onnukulla onnnaa
vandhu seru.

Vadagaikku kadhal vaangi
vazhavilla yaarum.
enna mattum vazha sollaadhey.

Udambukulla usura vittu
poga sollu neethaan.
unna vittu
poga sollaadhey.

Kaanugindra kaatchiyellaam
undhan poo mugam
adhu endhan niyabagam.

Kannukulla ippa
kadal kasivadha paaru
onnukulla onnnaa
vandhu seru. (2)

Kadhalukku kangal illai
kaalgal undu thaaney.
sollaamaley odi ponaale.

Vedandhaangal paravaikellaam
veru veru naadu.
unnudaya koodu naanadi.


Annaandhu paarkindra
kokku naanadi
andha vinmeen neeyadi.

Kannukulla ippa
kadal kasivadha paaru
onnukulla onnnaa
vandhu seru.

Agayam Theepidicha
nilaa thoongumaa
nee illaa neramellaam
nenjam thaangumaa

solakaattu bommaikkoru
sondham yaarumilla
kaiyya vittu kadhal ponaa
kayyil regaiyilla.

Kannukulla ippa
kadal kasivadha paaru
onnukulla onnnaa
vandhu seru		 English Translation
I tried my best :)
if sky catches fire- then
moon can't sleep.
while you're not near me
heart can't bear loneliness

there is no relation
for toy kept in corn field.
if love goes from my hand
my palm would be empty.

look at the tear in
my eyes like sea.
come and join
in me.

no one live
by renting love.
don't ask me to do so.

you can say my soul
to go away from my body
but don't say "you"
in me to go away

every thing I see
is your face, and
thats my remembrance

look at the tear in
my eyes like sea.
come and join
in me.

Love has no eyes
but leg
coz she ran away from me

There are different houses
for birds
but you are my nest


am the crane seeing
upwards,
you're the star in sky

look at the tear in
my eyes like sea.
come and join
in me. .

if sky catches fire
moon can't sleep
while you're not near me
heart can't bear loneliness

there is no relation
to the toy kept in corn field
if love goes from hand
my palm would be empty.

look at the tear in
my eyes like sea.
come and join
in me.

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

Who is the lead actor in the movie Madras?

The lead actor is Karthi.

What is the theme of the song Agayam Theepidicha?

The song explores themes of longing and emotional introspection.

Who composed the music for Madras?

The music was composed by Santhosh Narayanan.

When was the movie Madras released?

The movie was released in the year 2014.

Who penned the lyrics for the song Agayam Theepidicha?

The lyrics were written by Kabilan.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song Agayam Theepidicha from the 2014 Tamil movie Madras, starring Karthi and Catherine Tresa, is a poignant melody that delves into themes of longing and emotional depth. Sung by Pradeep Kumar with music composed by Santhosh Narayanan, the song's evocative lyrics by Kabilan beautifully reflect the narrative's emotional undertones. It captures the essence of introspection and resonates with listeners through its soulful composition. This track is a testament to the film's impactful storytelling and musical brilliance.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Agayam Theepidicha from Madras is a soul-stirring melody that captures the essence of longing and introspection. With Pradeep Kumar's heartfelt rendition and Santhosh Narayanan's evocative composition, this song resonates deeply with its listeners. Experience the poignant lyrics by Kabilan that beautifully complement the film's narrative.
stanzaMeanings: If the sky catches fire, the moon cannot sleep. When you are not near me, my heart cannot bear the loneliness. There is no connection to the toy left in the cornfield. If love leaves my hand, my palm will be empty. Look at the tear in my eyes like the sea. Come and join me.
